full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #71 (2026-06-23)

PULSE
Health: 0.5302 (C). 1058 wallets, 317 contributors. 60 memos today vs 217 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
127 reward payments, 375963 PFT distributed to 28 contributors. Top earner: r4RPpe...WghS (96250 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (0 PFT, avg 0/day over 3 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): raUWC4...TbsW (149 memos). Fastest new contributor: rHR5WT...E16F (9.0 memos/day in 2 days). 5 new wallet(s) this week. 93 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-24): 94 transactions from 13 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
